USDC.evidence: eth_getCode returned non-empty bytecode; symbol() ABI-decodes to 'USDC'; decimals() returned 6

WMON.verificationMethod: eth_getCode + confirmed as token0 in verified UniswapV3 WMON/USDC pool
WMON.evidence: eth_getCode returned non-empty bytecode (6501 bytes); token0() on pool 0x659bd0bc4167ba25c62e05656f78043e7ed4a9da returned this address

WETH.evidence: symbol() ABI-decodes to 'WETH'; decimals() returned 18; factory.getPool returned pool 0x25ef1a210ff55bcee9f8fee979aaff6bd1be5bf1 (non-zero); pool.liquidity() returned 0xa1d55c888c445 (non-zero). Candidate address sourced from community token-list (github.com/monad-crypto/token-list), verified independently on-chain, not trusted as-is.

USDT0.evidence: symbol() ABI-decodes to 'USDT'; decimals() returned 6; factory.getPool returned pool 0xa00d8ec3c0cc20e93cad749695392a0b61fe8ca3 (non-zero); pool.liquidity() returned 0x2dd029c20b (non-zero). venues.name: uniswap-v3
venues.capabilitiesEvidence: V3's pool.swap()/mint() callbacks verify the pool's balance increased by the *full* declared amountIn before accepting the transfer; a taxed transferFrom always delivers less than declared, so the callback check reverts for every seller. Architectural (Uniswap V3 core), not a config knob — see src/safety.ts comment.

factory.evidence: eth_getCode returned 49073-byte bytecode field on Monad mainnet RPC (rpc.monad.xyz)

permit2.evidence: eth_getCode returned 18307-byte bytecode field (canonical Permit2 deployment address, same on all EVM chains)

verifiedPools.verificationMethod: factory.getPool(WMON, USDC, 3000) eth_call, then pool.liquidity() + pool.token0() eth_call
verifiedPools.evidence: factory.getPool returned this pool address (non-zero); pool.liquidity() returned 0x167262b0caa659b7f (non-zero); pool.token0() returned WMON address, confirming pool composition
factory.getPool returned this pool address (non-zero); liquidity not separately checked, secondary pool for this pair
